questions.text: There are 4 main functionalities of CCS: Manage Condition contract, Manage workflow, Manage settlement & Manage reports.
Which one is NOT the workflow managed in CCS?
Which one is NOT included in the CCS contract creation?

options: Several contracts for a same customer to be “paid” all together
The contract to be “paid” by credit note to the customer

questions.text: What is the PRIMARY purpose of using Condition Contract Settlements (CCS) in SAP S/4?
options: To track and manage employee bonuses and commissions.
To automate the calculation and posting of depreciation on fixed assets.
To handle agreements with customers related to rebates, promotions, and services.
To reconcile bank statements and manage cash flow projections.

questions.text: There are 4 main functionalities of CCS: Manage Condition contract, Manage workflow, Manage settlement & Manage reports.
